infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: BarTools uses the camera to photograph bottles for inventory identification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: BarTools accesses your photo library to import bottle photos for inventory.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: BarTools does not use your location. This key is required because a bundled dependency references the Location API.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: BarTools does not record audio. This key is required by the camera framework used to photograph bottles.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: BarTools uses the camera to photograph bottles for inventory identification.

plugins.photosPermission: BarTools accesses your photo library to import bottle photos for inventory.
